Modala verb: must/have to (krav), should (råd), might/may (möjlighet), can (förmåga).
Ex: You must wear a seatbelt. You should study more. It might rain tomorrow.
Tips: Hur säker är du? must (100%) → should (råd) → might/could (kanske) → can't (omöjligt).

grammar.title: Blandad grammatik
grammar.description: For/since, few/little, adjektiv vs adverb, indirekt tal, relativa pronomen och modala verb.

exercises.sentence: I have lived here ___ five years.
exercises.hint: Tänk: är tidsuttrycket i meningen en period (hur länge?) eller en startpunkt (sedan när)?

exercises.sentence: I have lived here ___ 2018.
exercises.hint: Fråga dig: är '2018' en tidsperiod eller en startpunkt i tid? Välj det ord som passar för den typen av tidsuttryck.

exercises.question: There are ___ people waiting.
exercises.hint: 'Few' + räkningsbara (countable) substantiv: 'few people', 'few cars'. 'Little' + oräkningbara: 'little time', 'little money'.

exercises.question: There is ___ time left.
exercises.hint: 'Time' (tid) är oräkningsbart → 'little'. Jämför: 'a few minutes' (räkningsbart) vs 'little time' (oräkningsbart).

exercises.question: She is a ___ driver.
exercises.hint: Adjektiv beskriver substantiv: 'a careful driver'. Adverb beskriver verb: 'She drives carefully'. Här beskrivs 'driver' (substantiv) → adjektiv.

exercises.question: She drives ___.
exercises.hint: Adverb beskriver verb: 'She drives carefully'. Adjektiv beskriver substantiv. Här beskrivs 'drives' (verb) → adverb (-ly).

exercises.sentence: He used to ___ (live) here.
exercises.hint: 'Used to' kräver alltid att verbet böjs på ett visst sätt. Tänk på hur du kombinerar hjälpverb med huvudverb på engelska.

exercises.sentence: He said: 'I will come.' → He said that he ___ come.
exercises.hint: Vid indirekt tal 'backas' tempuset ett steg. Vad händer med 'will' när man rapporterar vad någon sade?

exercises.sentence: The woman ___ car was stolen called the police.
exercises.hint: Relativpronomen väljs beroende på vad de syftar på. Vilket relativpronomen används för att visa ägande/tillhörighet?

exercises.sentence: You ___ wear a helmet (obligation).
exercises.hint: Modalverb har olika styrka: råd, tillstånd eller skyldighet. Ledtråden i parentesen anger vilken typ av modal du ska använda.

exercises.sentence: You ___ leave early (permission).
exercises.hint: Ledtråden i parentesen hjälper dig. Vilket modalverb används formellt för att ge tillstånd?

exercises.question: Despite ___ tired, she continued.
exercises.hint: 'Despite' följs alltid av gerund (-ing): 'despite being tired'. 'Although' däremot följs av en fullständig sats.

exercises.sentence: We stayed home ___ it was raining.
exercises.hint: Konjunktioner kopplar ihop satser och visar relationen dem emellan. Meningen handlar om orsak – varför stannade de hemma?

exercises.question: He arrived ___ time.
exercises.hint: 'On time' = punktligt (vid den bestämda tiden). 'In time' = i tid (hinner, inte för sent). 'Arrived on time' = kom punktligt.

exercises.sentence: She has been studying ___ two hours.
exercises.hint: Tänk på om tidsuttrycket i meningen anger en period (hur länge?) eller en startpunkt. Välj rätt preposition.

exercises.sentence: She has been studying ___ 5 o'clock.
exercises.hint: '5 o'clock' – är det en tidsperiod eller en specifik tidpunkt? Välj prepositionen som passar den typen av tidsuttryck.

exercises.sentence: If you heat water, it ___ boil.
exercises.hint: Zero conditional (nollkonditional) används för fakta och naturlagar. Tänk på vilket tempus som används i båda satserna.

exercises.question: He is ___ tired to continue.
exercises.hint: 'Too' + adjektiv = för mycket (negativt resultat): 'too tired to continue' = för trött för att fortsätta. 'Very' förstärker utan negativt resultat.

exercises.sentence: She enjoys ___ (read) in the evenings.
exercises.hint: Verbet 'enjoy' kombineras alltid med en viss verbform. Tänk på vilken form av verbet som används efter verb som enjoy, finish, avoid.

exercises.question: I look forward to ___ you.
exercises.hint: 'Look forward to' + gerund (-ing). 'To' är här en preposition (inte infinitivmarkör) → -ing-form. 'Look forward to seeing you.'

helpText: Blandad grammatik – du tränar på flera regler på en gång. Läs noggrant!
For vs since: for + tidsperiod (for three years). since + startpunkt (since 2020).
Few/little: few + räknebart (few books). little + oräknebart (little water).
Adjektiv vs adverb: adjektiv beskriver substantiv (a fast car). adverb beskriver verb (he runs fast).
Tips: Identifiera ordklassen – beskriver ordet ett substantiv eller ett verb?

grammar.title: Substantiv – Avancerat
grammar.description: Räknebara och icke-räknebara substantiv, kollektiv och komplex plural.

exercises.question: Vilket substantiv är icke-räknebart?
exercises.explanation: 'Information' är icke-räknebart – man kan inte säga 'an information' eller 'two informations'.

exercises.question: 'The ___ is good.' Välj rätt alternativ:
exercises.explanation: 'Advice' är icke-räknebart – inga -s och ingen artikel 'an'. The advice is good.

exercises.sentence: Can you give me some ___? (advice)
exercises.hint: Räknebart eller icke-räknebart?
exercises.explanation: 'Advice' är icke-räknebart. Säg 'some advice', inte 'some advices'.

exercises.question: Vad är plural av 'criterion'?
exercises.explanation: 'Criterion' är ett latinskt lånord. Plural → criteria.

exercises.question: 'The committee ___ split on the issue.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: I brittisk engelska behandlas kollektiva substantiv (committee) som plural → are.

exercises.sentence: She needs ___ furniture for her new apartment.
exercises.hint: Räknebart eller icke-räknebart?
exercises.explanation: 'Furniture' är icke-räknebart → 'some furniture', inte 'a furniture'.

exercises.question: '___ of her hair had turned grey.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'Hair' är icke-räknebart → some. 'A few' och 'many' används med räknebara.

exercises.question: Vad är korrekt form?
exercises.explanation: 'Ox' → 'oxen' är en oregelbunden pluralform.

exercises.sentence: The media ___ reporting on the story. (is/are)
exercises.hint: Är media singular eller plural?
exercises.explanation: 'Media' (urspr. plural av medium) tar ofta 'are' i modern engelska.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'He gave me several ___ .' (piece of advice)
exercises.explanation: 'Advice' räknas med 'pieces': several pieces of advice.

grammar.title: Adjektiv & Adverb – Avancerat
grammar.description: Komparation, ordföljd och svåra fall med adjektiv och adverb.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'She speaks English ___.'
exercises.explanation: 'Speaks' är ett verb, så vi behöver ett adverb → fluently.

exercises.question: Välj rätt ordföljd: 'a ___ Italian silk scarf'
exercises.explanation: Adjektivordföljd: opinion → age → material → origin. Beautiful (opinion) old (age) Italian silk scarf.

exercises.sentence: This is the ___ (bad) result we have ever had.
exercises.hint: Superlativform av bad?
exercises.explanation: Bad → worse → worst. Superlativ: worst.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'I feel ___ today.' (hälsa)
exercises.explanation: Med 'feel' (länkverb) följer adjektivet → bad (inte adverbet badly).

exercises.question: 'The ___ you study, the ___ you become.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'The + comparative, the + comparative': The harder you study, the smarter you become.

exercises.sentence: He is ___ (far) away from home than I thought.
exercises.hint: Komparativ av far?
exercises.explanation: Far → farther (avstånd) / further (bildligt). Båda accepteras.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'This movie is ___ interesting than the last one.'
exercises.explanation: Komparativ med tvåstaviga+ adjektiv: more interesting.

exercises.question: 'She sings ___.' Vilket adverb är rätt?
exercises.explanation: Adverb bildas ofta med -ly: beautifully.

exercises.sentence: He is ___ (little) motivated than before.
exercises.hint: Komparativ av little?
exercises.explanation: Little → less → least. Less motivated.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'That was a ___ presentation.' (positiv bedömning, nästan perfekt)
exercises.explanation: 'Nearly' är adverb → nearly perfect presentation.

grammar.title: Do / Does / Did – Hjälpverb
grammar.description: Avancerad användning av do/does/did i frågor, betoning och negationer.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'She ___ study every day.' (betoning – det är sant!)
exercises.explanation: 'Does' kan användas för betoning: She DOES study every day (det stämmer verkligen!).

exercises.question: 'They claimed he never paid. But he ___ pay.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: Past tense med betoning: he DID pay (men de påstår motsatsen).

exercises.sentence: Never ___ I expect such a result.
exercises.hint: Inversion efter negativt adverb.
exercises.explanation: 'Never did I expect' – inversion med 'do/did' efter negativa adverbial.

exercises.question: '___ you understand what I mean?' – formal stil
exercises.explanation: Formell fråga i presens med you → Do you understand?

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'Rarely ___ she make mistakes.'
exercises.explanation: Inversion med negativt adverb 'rarely' + tredje person singular → does. Rarely does she...

exercises.sentence: Little ___ he know about the danger.
exercises.hint: Inversion med 'little' i preteritum.
exercises.explanation: 'Little did he know' – fast uttryck med inversion och did.

exercises.question: 'I don't like coffee.' 'Neither ___ I.'
exercises.explanation: 'Neither do I' = Jag heller inte. Agreement i presens med I.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'She doesn't exercise, but she ___ eat healthily.'
exercises.explanation: Betoning i tredje person presens: she DOES eat healthily.

exercises.sentence: Not only ___ he speak French, he also speaks German.
exercises.hint: Inversion med 'not only' i presens, tredje person.
exercises.explanation: 'Not only does he...' – inversion med does efter 'not only'.

exercises.question: 'Did she finish the project?' → 'Yes, she ___.'
exercises.explanation: Kortsvar i preteritum: Yes, she did.

helpText: 🎵 Ramsa: "DO betonar, DID betonade – 'She DOES care!' – tro på det sade!"
Do/does/did används som stödverb i frågor, negationer OCH för betoning (emphatic).
Betoning: I DO like it! She DOES know! He DID call you! (för att understryka att det är sant)
Frågeinversion: Rarely does she complain. Never did he give up. (negativt adverbial → inversion)
Exempel: Do you ever doubt yourself? – I do doubt myself sometimes, but I do believe in hard work. ✔
Tips: Did + grundform för betoning i dåtid: 'She said she didn't, but she DID go.' ✔

grammar.title: A / An – Avancerat
grammar.description: Svåra fall med obestämd artikel och när man utelämnar artikeln.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'He is ___ honest politician.' (sällsynt variant!)
exercises.explanation: 'Honest' → H är tyst, börjar med vokalljudet 'o' → an honest politician.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: '___ MBA degree'
exercises.explanation: 'MBA' uttalas 'em-bee-ay' – börjar med vokalljudet 'em' → an MBA degree.

exercises.sentence: She had ___ idea that changed everything.
exercises.hint: Vilket ljud börjar 'idea' med?
exercises.explanation: 'Idea' börjar med vokalljudet 'I' → an idea.

exercises.question: 'He became ___ MP after years of work.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'MP' (Member of Parliament) uttalas 'em-pee' → börjar med vokalljudet 'em' → an MP.

exercises.question: '___ unique opportunity' – välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'Unique' uttalas 'yoo-neek' – börjar med konsonantljudet Y → a unique opportunity.

exercises.question: När använder man INGEN artikel? 'She goes to ___ hospital every day (som sjuksköterska).'
exercises.explanation: När man talar om institutioner i sin 'funktion' (hospital = för att jobba), utelämnas artikeln i brittisk engelska.

exercises.sentence: He is ___ European who speaks perfect English.
exercises.hint: Titta på ljudet, inte bokstaven. Hur uttalas första ljudet i ordet?
exercises.explanation: 'European' uttalas 'yoo-ruh-pee-un' → konsonantljudet Y → a European.

exercises.question: 'She was ___ first to arrive.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: Med 'first' (ordningstal, superlativ) → the. She was the first to arrive.

exercises.question: '___ dog is man's best friend.' (generellt påstående) Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: Generellt påstående om en art → A dog is man's best friend. (alternativt 'Dogs are...')

exercises.question: '___ Nile is the longest river in Africa.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: Floder, hav, bergskedjor → the. The Nile.

helpText: 🎵 Ramsa: "Vokalljudet styr – AN ger sig till känna! H tyst som i 'hour'? AN får ränna!"
A/an styrs av UTTALET av nästa ord – inte stavningen.
Tyst h → an: an hour, an honest politician, an honour.
U som 'ju' → a: a university, a unique opportunity, a union.
Exempel: It was an honour to meet her. ✔  He studied at a European university. ✔  An MP spoke today. ✔
Tips: Förkortningar – kolla hur du uttalar första bokstaven: an MP (em-pi), a CEO (si-i-o) ✔

grammar.title: Is / Am / Are – Svåra fall
grammar.description: Komplexa fall med be-verbet: kongruens, passiv och konstruktioner.

exercises.question: 'The number of students ___ increasing.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'The number of' tar singular → is. The number of students is increasing.

exercises.question: 'A number of problems ___ been identified.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'A number of' tar plural → are. A number of problems are...

exercises.sentence: Neither the students nor the teacher ___ ready.
exercises.hint: 'Neither...nor': närmaste substantiv styr.
exercises.explanation: Med 'neither...nor' styr det närmaste substantivet (teacher = singular) → is.

exercises.question: 'The rich ___ not always happy.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'The + adjektiv' som substantivfras (the rich = rika människor) → plural → are.

exercises.question: 'Each of the answers ___ correct.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'Each of' tar alltid singular → is. Each of the answers is correct.

exercises.sentence: There ___ neither milk nor eggs in the fridge.
exercises.hint: 'Neither...nor' med uncountable: milk styr.
exercises.explanation: 'Neither milk nor eggs' – närmaste substantiv (eggs) är plural → are. OBS: Accepteras båda.

exercises.question: 'The police ___ investigating the matter.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'Police' är kollektivt och tas alltid som plural i engelska → are.

exercises.question: 'Twenty dollars ___ a lot for a child.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: Belopp som en enhet → singular → is. Twenty dollars is a lot.

exercises.sentence: Not all students ___ the same.
exercises.hint: Plural subjekt, ingen specialregel.
exercises.explanation: 'Students' = plural → are.

exercises.question: 'The majority of the population ___ in favour.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'The majority of' + plural noun → plural → are.

helpText: 🎵 Ramsa: "The number IS, a number ARE – kollektiv? Det beror på hur de går!"
Be-verbet i svåra fall: kongruens med komplexa subjekt.
The number of + plural → singular: The number of students is increasing. ✔
A number of + plural → plural: A number of problems are unsolved. ✔
Kollektiv: 'The team is winning.' (enhet) vs 'The team are arguing.' (individer – brittisk engelska) ✔
Exempel: Neither of them is wrong. ✔  Each of the answers is correct. ✔  The news is shocking. ✔

grammar.title: Have / Has – Avancerat
grammar.description: Have/has i idiom, kausativa konstruktioner och svåra fall.

exercises.question: 'I ___ my car repaired yesterday.' Välj rätt (kausativ):
exercises.explanation: Kausativ konstruktion: have + objekt + past participle. I had my car repaired.

exercises.question: 'She ___ her hair cut every month.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: Kausativ: have + objekt + past participle. She has her hair cut.

exercises.sentence: We ___ no choice but to leave.
exercises.hint: Preteritum av have.
exercises.explanation: Had no choice = hade inget val. Korrekt preteritumform.

exercises.question: 'Do you ___ any objections?' – formellt
exercises.explanation: 'Do you have' = formell frågeform. You → have.

exercises.question: 'He ___ difficulty understanding the instructions.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: Preteritum + singular: He had difficulty understanding.

exercises.sentence: They ___ a great time at the concert.
exercises.hint: Preteritum av have.
exercises.explanation: Had a great time = hade det jättebra. Preteritum: had.

exercises.question: 'She ___ it in for me ever since I got the promotion.' (idiom)
exercises.explanation: 'Have it in for someone' = ha ett horn i sidan till ngn. She has it in for me.

exercises.question: 'I ___ to admit, this is impressive.' Välj rätt (modal-liknande):
exercises.explanation: 'Have to' = måste. Med I → have to.

exercises.sentence: The company ___ its headquarters moved to Stockholm.
exercises.hint: Kausativ konstruktion, preteritum.
exercises.explanation: Kausativ: had + objekt + past participle. The company had its headquarters moved.

exercises.question: 'Do you ___ the time?' – informellt
exercises.explanation: Do you have the time? = Vet du vad klockan är? You → have.

helpText: 🎵 Ramsa: "HAD it done – kausativ fint! Have something done – låt någon annan grina!"
Kausativ konstruktion: have/get + objekt + past participle (= låta/få någon göra något).
Have something done: I had my hair cut. She had her car repaired. ✔
Get something done (mer informellt): I need to get this fixed. ✔
Presens perfekt: have/has + past participle → She has lived here for years. ✔
Exempel: We had the house painted last summer. ✔  Have you ever had your phone stolen? ✔

grammar.title: This / That / These / Those – Avancerat
grammar.description: Pekord i avancerade konstruktioner och idiom.

exercises.question: '___ who work hard tend to succeed.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'Those who' = de som. Those who work hard tend to succeed.

exercises.question: 'The situation is more complex than ___ described in the report.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: Syftar tillbaka på en situation (singular, nämnd): that. More complex than that described...

exercises.sentence: ___ said, let's move on to the next topic.
exercises.hint: Fast uttryck: '___  said'
exercises.explanation: 'That said' = Med det sagt. Fast adverbiellt uttryck.

exercises.question: 'At ___ time, nobody knew what would happen.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: Syftar på en tidpunkt i förfluten tid → that. At that time...

exercises.question: '___ are the times that try men's souls.' (klassiskt citat)
exercises.explanation: 'These are the times' – nuvarande tid, plural → these.

exercises.sentence: ___ is not to say that the plan is perfect.
exercises.hint: Fast idiomatiskt uttryck.
exercises.explanation: 'That is not to say' = Det betyder inte att... Fast uttryck.

exercises.question: 'Her early works differ greatly from ___ of her later period.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'Those of her later period' – plural, syftar på 'works'. Those = de (verk).

exercises.question: '___ being said, I still think we should try.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'That being said' = Med det sagt. Fast uttryck.

exercises.sentence: In ___ days, people rarely travelled abroad.
exercises.hint: Pratar om gamla tider, plural.
exercises.explanation: 'In those days' = på den tiden. Fast uttryck för förfluten tid.

exercises.question: 'The results of the experiment are consistent with ___ of previous studies.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'Those of previous studies' – plural (results). Syftar på plural noun.

helpText: 🎵 Ramsa: "Those WHO gör meningar fina – this/that i text bygger stilen din-a!"
Pekorden används idiomatiskt och i mer komplexa sammanhang på högstadienivå.
Those who / Those of us who: Those who work hard tend to succeed. ✔
That i relativsatser: The book that I read was fascinating. ✔
This/that för att referera till tidigare sagt: That's a good point. This is why it matters. ✔
Exempel: Those of you who are ready may begin. ✔  This suggests that the theory is correct. ✔

grammar.title: There is / There are – Avancerat
grammar.description: Komplex kongruens, formella konstruktioner och there-satser.

exercises.question: 'There ___ a number of issues to address.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'A number of issues' (plural intention) → are. There are a number of issues.

exercises.question: 'There ___ no evidence to support this claim.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'Evidence' är icke-räknebart → singular → is. There is no evidence.

exercises.sentence: There ___ neither time nor resources available.
exercises.hint: 'Neither...nor': titta på närmaste substantiv – singular eller plural?
exercises.explanation: Med 'neither...nor' styr närmaste substantiv. Resources = plural → are. Men 'neither time nor resources' → formellt is (time styr) accepteras också.

exercises.question: 'There ___ said to be ancient ruins beneath the city.' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'Ruins' = plural → are. There are said to be ancient ruins...

exercises.question: Formellt: '___ any objection to this proposal?' Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'Any objection' = singular → Is there any objection?

exercises.sentence: There ___ countless stars in the universe.
exercises.hint: Oräkneliga stjärnor = plural.
exercises.explanation: 'Countless stars' = plural → are. There are countless stars.

exercises.question: 'There ___ to be a misunderstanding.' (verkar vara) Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: 'There seems to be' = Det verkar finnas. Singular → seems.

exercises.question: 'There is no smoke without fire.' Denna mening innebär:
options: Det finns ingen rök utan eld (bokstavligt)
Där det är rök finns det eld (idiom: rykten har grund)
exercises.explanation: 'No smoke without fire' = idiom som betyder att rykten ofta har en grund.

exercises.sentence: There ___ been significant progress in this field.
exercises.hint: Present perfect med there.
exercises.explanation: 'There has been' = det har skett. Singular (progress) → has.

exercises.question: 'There ___ many occasions when I doubted myself.' (preteritum) Välj rätt:
exercises.explanation: Preteritum plural (many occasions) → were. There were many occasions...

helpText: 🎵 Ramsa: "A number ARE – the number IS! There's a trick att lära i detta vis!"
There is/are i avancerade konstruktioner – kongruens och formellt språk.
A number of → are: There are a number of issues to address. ✔
The number of → is: There is a large number of applicants. ✔
Formellt: There exists / There remain: There remains much to be done. ✔
Exempel: There have been several attempts. ✔  There seems to be a misunderstanding. ✔

grammar.title: Aktiviteter (Activities)
grammar.description: Lär dig engelska ord och fraser för aktiviteter och hobbies.
helpText: 🏃 Aktiviteter och hobbies på engelska!
simma = swim | springa = run | laga mat = cook | rita = draw
sjunga = sing | dansa = dance | cykla = cycle/ride a bike
klättra = climb | fotografera = take photos | måla = paint
Tips: I Present Simple lägger vi till -s för he/she/it: she swims, he runs.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'simma' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Simma = swim. She swims every morning.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'laga mat' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Laga mat = cook. He loves to cook Italian food.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'klättra' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Klättra = climb. They climbed the mountain.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'fotografera' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Fotografera = take photos. I love to take photos of nature.

exercises.sentence: I enjoy ___ (sjunga på engelska) in the school choir.
exercises.hint: Lägg till -ing till verbets grundform
exercises.explanation: Sjunga = sing. After enjoy, we use the -ing form: singing.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'måla (tavlor)' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Måla = paint (tavlor/konstmålning). Draw = rita med penna/papper.

exercises.question: 'She ___ every weekend.' Vilket alternativ passar för 'dansar'?
exercises.explanation: Dansa = dance. Med she/he/it lägger vi till -s: she dances.

exercises.sentence: He likes ___ (cykla på engelska) to work.
exercises.hint: Lägg till -ing till verbets grundform
exercises.explanation: Cykla = cycle. After likes, we use -ing form: cycling.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'skriva' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Skriva = write. I like to write short stories.

exercises.question: Vilket verb betyder 'springa' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Springa = run (allmänt). Jog = jogga, sprint = spurta.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'läsa (böcker)' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Läsa (böcker) = read. I read for an hour before bed.

exercises.sentence: They spent the evening ___ (rita på engelska) portraits.
exercises.hint: Lägg till -ing till verbets grundform
exercises.explanation: Rita = draw. After spent the evening, we use the -ing form: drawing.

grammar.title: Känslor (Emotions)
grammar.description: Lär dig engelska ord för känslor och hur de används i meningar.
helpText: 😊 Känsloord på engelska – berätta hur du mår!
glad = happy | ledsen = sad | arg = angry | rädd = scared/afraid
förvånad = surprised | trött = tired | nervös = nervous
stolt = proud | ensam = lonely | förvirrad = confused
entusiastisk = enthusiastic | avslappnad = relaxed
Tips: 'I feel + adjektiv' eller 'I am + adjektiv' – båda fungerar!

exercises.question: Vad heter 'glad' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Glad = happy. I am happy today!

exercises.question: Vad heter 'ledsen' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Ledsen = sad. She felt sad after the bad news.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'arg' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Arg = angry. He was very angry about the situation.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'rädd' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Rädd = afraid (eller scared). I was afraid of the dark.

exercises.sentence: She was ___ (förvånad på engelska) by the unexpected gift.
exercises.hint: Förvånad = s _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
exercises.explanation: Förvånad = surprised. She was surprised by the gift.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'trött' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Trött = tired. I feel tired after the long day.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'nervös' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Nervös = nervous. I was nervous before the exam.

exercises.sentence: She felt ___ (stolt på engelska) of her achievement.
exercises.hint: Stolt = p _ _ _ _
exercises.explanation: Stolt = proud. She felt proud of her hard work.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'ensam' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Ensam (känslan) = lonely. Alone = fysiskt ensam. He felt lonely without his friends.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'förvirrad' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Förvirrad = confused. I was confused by the instructions.

exercises.sentence: The crowd was ___ (entusiastisk på engelska) about the concert.
exercises.hint: Entusiastisk = e _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
exercises.explanation: Entusiastisk = enthusiastic. The crowd was enthusiastic!

exercises.question: Vad heter 'avslappnad' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Avslappnad = relaxed. I feel relaxed after yoga.

grammar.title: Fylla i: Past Tense (preteritum)
grammar.description: Skriv rätt form av verbet i preteritum.
helpText: Regelbundna verb: lägg till -ed
play → played  |  walk → walked  |  watch → watched
Oregelbundna verb (måste läras utantill):
go → went  |  eat → ate  |  write → wrote
see → saw  |  meet → met
Presens vs preteritum:
is → was  |  are → were

exercises.sentence: Yesterday I ___ to school. (go)
exercises.hint: Oregelbundna verb ändrar form i preteritum – se verblistpa!
exercises.explanation: go → went (oregelbundet preteritum).

exercises.sentence: She ___ lunch at noon. (eat)
exercises.hint: Oregelbundna verb ändrar form i preteritum – se verblistpa!
exercises.explanation: eat → ate.

exercises.sentence: They ___ football yesterday. (play)
exercises.hint: Regelbundet verb: add -ed
exercises.explanation: play → played.

exercises.sentence: He ___ a letter last night. (write)
exercises.hint: Oregelbundna verb ändrar form i preteritum – se verblistpa!
exercises.explanation: write → wrote.

exercises.question: I ___ to school yesterday. (walk)
exercises.explanation: Yesterday → preteritum: walked.

exercises.question: She ___ happy yesterday. (is/was)
exercises.explanation: Yesterday → preteritum: she was.

exercises.sentence: We ___ the film last night. (watch)
exercises.hint: Regelbundet: add -ed
exercises.explanation: watch → watched.

exercises.sentence: He ___ his friend at the station. (meet)
exercises.hint: Oregelbundna verb ändrar form i preteritum – se verblistpa!
exercises.explanation: meet → met.

exercises.question: They ___ football last week.
exercises.explanation: Last week → preteritum: played.

exercises.sentence: I ___ a great film last Friday. (see)
exercises.hint: Oregelbundna verb ändrar form i preteritum – se verblistpa!
exercises.explanation: see → saw.

exercises.question: They ___ at home yesterday. (are/were)
exercises.explanation: Yesterday → preteritum: they were.

exercises.sentence: She ___ her keys this morning. (find)
exercises.hint: Oregelbundna verb ändrar form i preteritum – se verblistpa!
exercises.explanation: find → found.

grammar.title: Fylla i: Komparativ, superlativ & frågeform
grammar.description: Jämförelseformer och frågebildning med be-verb.
helpText: Komparativ (jämförelse): adjektiv + -er + than
big → bigger  |  fast → faster  |  tall → taller
Superlativ (yttersta graden): the + adjektiv + -est
big → biggest  |  fast → fastest  |  tall → tallest
OBS: korta adjektiv på konsonant dubbleras: big → bigger/biggest
Oregelbundna: good → better → best  |  bad → worse → worst
Frågeform med be-verb: flytta verbet framför subjektet
You are happy. → Are you happy?

exercises.sentence: This book is ___ than that one. (big)
exercises.hint: Komparativ: korta adjektiv + -er (dubblera konsonant)
exercises.explanation: big → bigger (dubblera g).

exercises.sentence: He is ___ than me. (fast)
exercises.hint: Komparativ: + -er
exercises.explanation: fast → faster.

exercises.question: She is ___ than her sister. (tall)
exercises.explanation: Komparativ av korta adjektiv: + -er. tall → taller.

exercises.sentence: This is the ___ house on the street. (big)
exercises.hint: Superlativ: the + adjektiv + -est (dubblera konsonant)
exercises.explanation: big → biggest.

exercises.sentence: She is the ___ runner in the class. (fast)
exercises.hint: Superlativ: the + adjektiv + -est
exercises.explanation: fast → fastest.

exercises.question: He is the ___ student in class. (smart)
exercises.explanation: Superlativ av korta adjektiv: the + -est. smart → smartest.

exercises.sentence: You are happy. → ___ you happy?
exercises.hint: Flytta be-verbet framför subjektet
exercises.explanation: Are you happy? – inverterar be-verbet.

exercises.sentence: She is here. → ___ she here?
exercises.hint: Flytta be-verbet framför subjektet
exercises.explanation: Is she here?

exercises.question: They are students. → ___ they students?
exercises.explanation: Are they students? – inverterar be-verbet.

exercises.sentence: This is the ___ film I have ever seen. (good)
exercises.hint: good har oregelbundna jämförelseformer – tänk på 'bättre' och 'bäst'
exercises.explanation: good → better → best.

exercises.sentence: That was the ___ day of my life. (bad)
exercises.hint: bad har oregelbundna jämförelseformer – tänk på 'sämre' och 'sämst'
exercises.explanation: bad → worse → worst.

exercises.question: He is ___ than his brother. (good)
exercises.explanation: good → better (oregelbunden komparativ).

grammar.title: Frågeord
grammar.description: Avancerade frågeord och indirekta frågor.
helpText: 🔑 Frågeordsordning i direkta frågor: frågeord + hjälpverb + subjekt + huvudverb. 'Where did she go?'
INDIREKTA FRÅGOR byter ordning: no hjälpverb + subjekt + verb. 'Do you know where she went?' (NOT 'where did she go')
WHAT vs WHICH: What = öppen fråga om vad som helst. Which = val mellan specifika alternativ. 'What film?' (öppet) vs 'Which of these films?' (begränsat val)
WHOSE frågar om ägande och kan stå ensamt eller följas av ett substantiv. 'Whose is this?' / 'Whose car is this?'
HOW + adjektiv/adverb: How long have you studied? · How often does she call? · To what extent...?

exercises.question: Vilken mening är grammatiskt korrekt?
options: Do you know where is she?
Do you know where she is?
Do you know where does she live?
Do you know where is she from?
exercises.explanation: I indirekta frågor används vanlig ordföljd (subjekt + verb), inte frågeordföljd. 'Do you know where she is?' är rätt.

exercises.sentence: Can you tell me ___ the meeting starts?
exercises.hint: Indirekt fråga – vanlig ordföljd efter frågeordet.
exercises.explanation: Can you tell me when the meeting starts? Indirekt fråga: frågeord + subjekt + verb (ingen inversion).

exercises.question: Vilket frågeord passar? '___ extent does social media influence teenagers?'
exercises.explanation: 'To what extent' = I vilken utsträckning. Detta är ett formellt uttryck för att fråga om grad/nivå.

exercises.sentence: Do you know ___ invented the telephone?
exercises.hint: Frågar om en person i en indirekt fråga.
exercises.explanation: Do you know who invented the telephone? = Vet du vem som uppfann telefonen? (Indirekt fråga, ingen inversion)

exercises.question: Vilket frågeord passar bäst? '___ of these arguments do you find most convincing?'
exercises.explanation: Which används när vi väljer bland ett begränsat antal alternativ ('these arguments'). Which of these = Vilken av dessa.

exercises.sentence: She asked me ___ I was planning to do after school.
exercises.hint: Indirekt fråga efter 'asked me'.
exercises.explanation: She asked me what I was planning to do. Indirekt fråga: what + subjekt + verb.

exercises.instruction: Bygg frågan: 'Varför kom hon inte till skolan?'
exercises.explanation: Why didn't she come to school? = Varför kom hon inte till skolan? Direkta frågor: frågeord + hjälpverb + subjekt.

exercises.question: Vilken fråga är korrekt?
options: Could you explain how does this process work?
Could you explain how this process works?
Could you explain how this process work?
Could you explain how work this process?
exercises.explanation: Indirekt fråga efter 'explain': how + subjekt + verb (no inversion). 'Could you explain how this process works?'

exercises.sentence: ___ long have you been studying English?
exercises.hint: How + long frågar om varaktighet (Hur länge).
exercises.explanation: How long have you been studying English? = Hur länge har du studerat engelska? (Nuvarande perfekt kontinuerlig)

exercises.instruction: Bygg frågan: 'Hur länge har du studerat engelska?'
exercises.explanation: How long have you studied English? = Hur länge har du studerat engelska?

exercises.sentence: I wonder ___ she decided to move abroad.
exercises.hint: Indirekt fråga om orsak med 'I wonder'.
exercises.explanation: I wonder why she decided to move abroad. = Jag undrar varför hon bestämde sig för att flytta utomlands.

exercises.question: Vilken mening är korrekt?
options: I don't know what time does the train leave.
I don't know what time the train leaves.
I don't know what time leaves the train.
I don't know at what time does the train leave.
exercises.explanation: Indirekt fråga: frågeord + subjekt + verb. 'I don't know what time the train leaves.' (ingen inversion)

exercises.sentence: ___ many times have you visited a foreign country?
exercises.hint: How many + räkningsbara substantiv = Hur många.
exercises.explanation: How many times = Hur många gånger. Frågar om antal tillfällen.

exercises.question: Vilket frågeord passar? '___ responsibility is it to ensure students' wellbeing?'
exercises.explanation: Whose frågar om ägande/ansvar. Whose responsibility = Vems ansvar.

exercises.sentence: Could you explain ___ you mean by that statement?
exercises.hint: Indirekt fråga – frågar om en sak/innebörd.
exercises.explanation: Could you explain what you mean by that? = Kan du förklara vad du menar med det? Indirekt fråga: what + subjekt + verb.

grammar.title: Synonymer
grammar.description: Avancerade synonymer – bygg upp ett rikt engelska ordförråd.
helpText: 📖 En SYNONYM är ett ord med liknande betydelse som ett annat – men ofta med olika styrka eller nyans.
Exempel: 'big' → 'large' → 'enormous' → 'gigantic' – alla betyder stor men med ökande styrka.
Exempel: 'respond' och 'reply' är synonymer – båda betyder svara.
Tips: I formell engelska används ofta längre, latinska ord (obtain, demonstrate, evaluate) istället för korta (get, show, check).

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'enormous'?
exercises.explanation: 'Enormous' and 'gigantic' are synonyms – both mean jättestor.

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'respond'?
exercises.explanation: 'Respond' and 'reply' are synonyms – both mean svara.

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'obtain'?
exercises.explanation: 'Obtain' and 'acquire' are synonyms – both mean skaffa/erhålla.

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'sufficient'?
exercises.explanation: 'Sufficient' and 'adequate' are synonyms – both mean tillräcklig.

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'anxious'?
exercises.explanation: 'Anxious' and 'nervous' are synonyms – both mean nervös/orolig.

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'conceal'?
exercises.explanation: 'Conceal' and 'hide' are synonyms – both mean dölja/gömma.

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'accomplish'?
exercises.explanation: 'Accomplish' and 'achieve' are synonyms – both mean uppnå/utföra.

exercises.sentence: The scientist wanted to ___ the results. (synonym for 'evaluate')
exercises.explanation: 'Assess' is a synonym for 'evaluate' – both mean bedöma/utvärdera.

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'rapid'?
exercises.explanation: 'Rapid' and 'swift' are synonyms – both mean snabb.

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'ancient'?
exercises.explanation: 'Ancient' and 'historical' overlap in meaning – both relate to very old/from the past.

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'significant'?
exercises.explanation: 'Significant' and 'important' are synonyms – both mean viktig/betydande.

exercises.sentence: The teacher asked her to ___ her answer in more detail. (synonym for 'explain further')
exercises.explanation: 'Elaborate' means to develop or explain in more detail.

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'persistent'?
exercises.explanation: 'Persistent' and 'determined' are synonyms – both mean envis/målmedveten.

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'transparent'?
exercises.explanation: 'Transparent' and 'clear' are synonyms – both mean genomskinlig/tydlig.

exercises.question: Which word is a synonym for 'demonstrate'?
exercises.explanation: 'Demonstrate' and 'show' are synonyms – both mean visa/demonstrera.

grammar.title: Motsatsord
grammar.description: Avancerade antonymer – träna på komplexa ordpar på gymnasienivå.
helpText: ↔️ MOTSATSORD (antonymer) på avancerad nivå kan vara prefix-baserade: 'possible' ↔ 'impossible', 'relevant' ↔ 'irrelevant'.
Exempel: 'optimistic' ↔ 'pessimistic' (positiv syn ↔ negativ syn på framtiden)
Exempel: 'voluntary' ↔ 'compulsory' (frivillig ↔ obligatorisk)
Tips: Många antonymer bildas med prefix: un-, im-, in-, ir-, dis-.

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'optimistic'?
exercises.explanation: Optimistic (optimistisk) ↔ pessimistic (pessimistisk).

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'voluntary'?
exercises.explanation: Voluntary (frivillig) ↔ compulsory (obligatorisk/tvingande).

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'temporary'?
exercises.explanation: Temporary (tillfällig) ↔ permanent (permanent/varaktig).

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'reveal'?
exercises.explanation: Reveal (avslöja/visa) ↔ conceal (dölja/gömma).

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'constructive'?
exercises.explanation: Constructive (konstruktiv/uppbygglig) ↔ destructive (destruktiv/nedbrytande).

exercises.sentence: The opposite of 'expand' is ___. (think: dra ihop sig)
exercises.explanation: Expand (expandera) ↔ contract/shrink (dra ihop sig/krympa).

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'superior'?
exercises.explanation: Superior (överlägsen) ↔ inferior (underlägsen).

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'abundance'?
exercises.explanation: Abundance (överflöd) ↔ scarcity (brist/knapphet).

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'encourage'?
exercises.explanation: Encourage (uppmuntra) ↔ discourage (avskräcka/motverka).

exercises.sentence: The opposite of 'majority' is ___. (think: minoritet)
exercises.explanation: Majority (majoritet) ↔ minority (minoritet).

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'abstract'?
exercises.explanation: Abstract (abstrakt) ↔ concrete (konkret).

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'unity'?
exercises.explanation: Unity (enhet/sammanhållning) ↔ division (splittring/oenighet).

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'reward'?
exercises.explanation: Reward (belöna) ↔ punish (bestraffa).

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'amplify'?
exercises.explanation: Amplify (förstärka) ↔ reduce (minska/reducera).

exercises.question: What is the opposite of 'relevant'?
exercises.explanation: Relevant (relevant) ↔ irrelevant (irrelevant/ointressant).

grammar.title: Some och Any
grammar.description: Avancerad användning av some och any – nyanser och undantag.
helpText: ✅ SOME → positiva meningar och erbjudanden/förfrågningar i frågor.
❓ ANY → frågor (neutral) och negationer.
🔄 ANY kan också betyda 'vilken/vilket som helst' i positiva meningar: 'You can sit in any seat.' (= vilken plats som helst)
📌 SOME i meningar som 'Some people think...' syftar på 'en del människor' (inte alla).

exercises.question: I haven't made ___ progress on my essay yet.
exercises.explanation: Negation (haven't made) → any.

exercises.question: You can sit in ___ seat you like. ('vilken ... som helst')
exercises.explanation: Any i positiv mening = 'vilken som helst': 'You can sit in any seat you like.'

exercises.question: Would you like ___ assistance with that?
exercises.explanation: Artigt erbjudande → some: 'Would you like some assistance?'

exercises.sentence: She rarely makes ___ effort to improve.
exercises.explanation: 'Rarely' ger meningen en negativ innebörd → any.

exercises.question: There must be ___ explanation for this behaviour.
exercises.explanation: Positiv mening, oräknebart → some: 'There must be some explanation.'

exercises.question: Could you lend me ___ money?
exercises.explanation: Förfrågan (man hoppas på ja) → some: 'Could you lend me some money?'

exercises.sentence: He could not find ___ evidence to support his theory.
exercises.explanation: Negation (could not find) → any.

exercises.question: ___ people believe that climate change is not real.
exercises.explanation: Some people = 'En del människor' (en grupp, inte alla). Some i positiv mening.

exercises.sentence: She barely has ___ free time during the week.
exercises.explanation: 'Barely' ger negativ innebörd → any.

exercises.question: We were able to gather ___ useful data.
exercises.explanation: Positiv mening → some: 'We gathered some useful data.'

exercises.instruction: Bygg meningen: 'Jag hittade inte några ledtrådar på brottsplatsen.'
exercises.explanation: Negation (didn't find) → any.

exercises.question: Is there ___ particular reason you are late?
exercises.explanation: Neutral fråga → any: 'Is there any particular reason...?'

exercises.sentence: The police found ___ clues at the scene.
exercises.explanation: Positiv mening → some.

exercises.question: They didn't face ___ serious problems during the project.
exercises.explanation: Negation (didn't face) → any.

exercises.question: Do you want ___ help carrying those bags?
exercises.explanation: Erbjudande → some: 'Do you want some help?' (man hoppas på ja)

grammar.title: Sluttest – Grammatik
grammar.description: Testa allt du lärt dig i grammatikdelen! 39 blandade frågor.
helpText: Det här är sluttestet för hela grammatikdelen!
Frågorna täcker allt du har tränat på: present perfect, conditional, passiv form, reported speech och avancerade verbformer.
Nu ingår även vokabulär: kläder, mat, möbler, känslor, väder, sporter och fordon.
Svara på alla 39 frågor och se hur bra du är. Du behöver minst 60% rätt för att klara testet!

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'I ___ never been to Japan.'
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect bildas med have/has + past participle. I have never been.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'She ___ just finished her homework.'
exercises.explanation: Med he/she/it använder vi 'has' i present perfect. She has just finished.

exercises.question: Välj rätt: 'They ___ lived here for ten years.'
exercises.explanation: Med they (pluralis) använder vi 'have'. They have lived here for ten years.

exercises.question: Typ 1-konditionalis: 'If it rains, we ___ stay inside.'
exercises.explanation: Typ 1 konditionalis: If + present simple, will + grundform. We will stay inside.

exercises.question: Typ 2-konditionalis: 'If I had a million euros, I ___ travel the world.'
exercises.explanation: Typ 2 konditionalis: If + past simple, would + grundform. I would travel.

exercises.question: Passiv form: 'The window ___ broken by the children.'
exercises.explanation: Passiv i past tense: was/were + past participle. The window was broken.

exercises.question: Passiv form: 'The book ___ written in 1850.'
exercises.explanation: Passiv past tense med singular subjekt: was + past participle. Was written.

exercises.question: Indirekt tal: 'She said she ___ tired.'
exercises.explanation: I indirekt tal ändras 'is' till 'was' (backshift). She said she was tired.

exercises.question: Indirekt tal: 'He told me he ___ finished.'
exercises.explanation: I indirekt tal ändras 'has' till 'had' (backshift). He told me he had finished.

exercises.question: Past Perfect: 'By the time we arrived, she ___ already left.'
exercises.explanation: Past Perfect bildas med 'had' + past participle. She had already left.

exercises.question: Past Perfect: 'They couldn't find the key because they ___ lost it.'
exercises.explanation: Past Perfect: had + past participle. They had lost it.

exercises.question: Futurum: 'I think it ___ rain tomorrow.'
exercises.explanation: Vi använder 'will' för förutsägelser om framtiden. It will rain.

exercises.question: Going to: 'Look at those clouds! It ___ rain.'
exercises.explanation: 'Going to' används för planer och uppenbara händelser. It is going to rain.

exercises.question: Modalverb (skyldighet): 'You ___ wear a seatbelt in a car.'
exercises.explanation: 'Must' uttrycker stark skyldighet/krav. You must wear a seatbelt.

exercises.question: Modalverb (osäkerhet): 'She ___ be at home. I'm not sure.'
exercises.explanation: 'Might' uttrycker osäkerhet/möjlighet. She might be at home.

exercises.question: Indirekt fråga: 'She asked where ___ from.'
exercises.explanation: I indirekta frågor används rak ordföljd + backshift. She asked where I came from.

exercises.question: Present Perfect-fråga: '___ you ever eaten sushi?'
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect fråga med 'you': Have you ever eaten sushi?

exercises.question: Passiv fråga: '___ the letter sent?'
exercises.explanation: Passiv fråga i past tense (singular): Was the letter sent?

exercises.question: Typ 3-konditionalis: 'If she ___ harder, she would have passed.'
exercises.explanation: Typ 3 konditionalis: If + past perfect, would have + past participle.

exercises.question: Aktiv → passiv: 'Someone cleaned the office.' → 'The office ___ cleaned.'
exercises.explanation: Passiv past tense: was + past participle. The office was cleaned.

exercises.question: Present Perfect vs Past Simple: '___ you see the film last night?'
exercises.explanation: 'Last night' är en specifik tidpunkt → Past Simple. Did you see the film?

exercises.question: Typ 2-konditionalis: 'What ___ you do if you won the lottery?'
exercises.explanation: Typ 2 konditionalis med 'what': What would you do if you won...?

exercises.sentence: I ___ never tried skydiving. (present perfect)
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect med 'I': I have never tried...

exercises.sentence: The letter was ___ by my teacher. (write)
exercises.explanation: Passiv form kräver past participle. Write → written.

exercises.sentence: If it rains, I ___ take an umbrella. (typ 1)
exercises.explanation: Typ 1 konditionalis: If + present simple, will + grundform.

exercises.sentence: She told me she ___ going to the gym. (indirekt tal, was/is)
exercises.explanation: Backshift i indirekt tal: 'is going' → 'was going'.

exercises.sentence: The homework must ___ done by Friday. (passiv)
exercises.explanation: Modal + passiv: must + be + past participle. Must be done.

exercises.sentence: If I were rich, I ___ buy a yacht. (typ 2)
exercises.explanation: Typ 2 konditionalis: If + past simple, would + grundform.

exercises.sentence: The window ___ broken yesterday. (passiv past tense)
exercises.explanation: Passiv past tense med singular: was + past participle.

exercises.sentence: He asked where I ___ from. (indirekt fråga)
exercises.explanation: Backshift i indirekt fråga: 'come' → 'came'.

exercises.sentence: ___ you ever been to England?
exercises.explanation: Present Perfect fråga med 'you': Have you ever been...?

exercises.sentence: She ___ have forgotten – she never forgets anything! (modal, omöjlighet)
exercises.explanation: 'Can't have' + past participle uttrycker att något omöjligen kan ha hänt.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'kofta' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Kofta = cardigan. A cardigan has buttons.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'kök' (matlagningstradition) på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Kök (tradition) = cuisine. Italian cuisine is popular.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'fåtölj' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Fåtölj = armchair. Relax in the armchair.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'frustrerad' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Frustrerad = frustrated. Almost the same word!

exercises.question: Vad heter 'luftfuktighet' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Luftfuktighet = humidity. High humidity feels uncomfortable.

exercises.question: Vad heter 'badminton' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Badminton = badminton. Same word in both languages!

exercises.question: Vad heter 'ambulans' på engelska?
exercises.explanation: Ambulans = ambulance. Almost the same word!

reading.title: The Impact of Social Media
reading.description: Sociala mediers påverkan på ungdomar — en diskuterande text.
reading.text:
Social media platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, and Snapchat have become an integral part of modern teenage life. According to recent surveys, teenagers spend an average of four to six hours per day on these platforms. This raises important questions about both the benefits and drawbacks of social media.

On the positive side, social media enables young people to stay connected with friends and family, particularly those who live far away. It also provides a space for creative expression, allowing users to share art, music, and writing with a global audience. Furthermore, social media can be a powerful tool for raising awareness about social issues, as seen in various youth-led movements.

However, there are serious concerns about the negative effects. Research suggests that excessive use of social media is linked to increased levels of anxiety and depression, particularly among girls. The constant comparison with carefully edited images can damage self-esteem. Additionally, cyberbullying remains a significant problem, with many young people experiencing harassment online.

Psychologists recommend finding a healthy balance. Setting time limits, taking regular breaks, and focusing on positive, meaningful interactions are all strategies that can help. The key is not to avoid social media entirely, but to use it mindfully.

questions.question: How many hours per day do teenagers spend on social media, according to surveys?
questions.explanation: The text states 'teenagers spend an average of four to six hours per day on these platforms'.

questions.question: Why does the text mention 'carefully edited images' when discussing self-esteem?
options: To show that photography is a popular hobby.
To suggest that people on social media only show perfect, unrealistic images, leading to unfair comparisons.
To prove that editing skills are important to learn.
To argue that all social media images are fake.
questions.explanation: The text implies that people compare themselves to edited (not real) images, which creates an unfair standard and can make people feel inferior.

questions.question: What is the author's overall position on social media?
options: Social media is entirely harmful and should be banned for teenagers.
Social media is only positive if used for creative expression.
Social media has both benefits and drawbacks and should be used mindfully.
Research on social media is unreliable and should be ignored.
questions.explanation: The author presents both sides and ends with advice on using it 'mindfully' — a balanced, nuanced view.

helpText: Det här är en diskuterande text – den presenterar argument för OCH emot.
Läs för att förstå: Vad är textens huvudbudskap? Vilka argument ges?
'Mellan raderna'-frågor kräver slutledning – vad antyder och IMPLICERAR texten?
Tips: Markera nyckelmeningar som sammanfattar varje stycke – de innehåller ofta svar.

reading.title: Climate Change: What Can We Do?
reading.description: En argumenterande text om klimatförändringar och individens roll.
reading.text:
Climate change is one of the most pressing issues of our time. Global temperatures have risen by approximately 1.1 degrees Celsius since pre-industrial times, leading to more frequent extreme weather events, rising sea levels, and loss of biodiversity.

Scientists agree that the primary cause is the emission of greenhouse gases — particularly carbon dioxide from burning fossil fuels such as coal, oil, and natural gas. While governments and corporations bear the greatest responsibility for tackling this crisis, individuals can also make a meaningful difference.

One of the most impactful personal choices is diet. Studies show that reducing meat consumption — particularly beef — can significantly lower one's carbon footprint, as livestock farming produces large amounts of methane, a powerful greenhouse gas. Choosing plant-based meals even two or three days a week can make a real difference.

Transportation is another key area. Flying and driving private cars are among the most carbon-intensive activities. Choosing public transport, cycling, or walking when possible can substantially reduce emissions.

Critics argue that individual actions are too small to matter when corporations produce the vast majority of global emissions. This is a valid point. However, consumer choices collectively influence corporate behaviour, and civic engagement — voting, protesting, contacting representatives — can drive systemic change.

The climate crisis requires action at every level. Individual responsibility and systemic change are not mutually exclusive — both are essential.

questions.question: What does the text identify as the primary cause of climate change?
options: Emission of greenhouse gases from fossil fuels
questions.explanation: The text says 'the primary cause is the emission of greenhouse gases — particularly carbon dioxide from burning fossil fuels'.

questions.question: Why does the author mention diet changes 'even two or three days a week'?
options: To suggest that becoming fully vegan is the only solution.
To make the suggestion feel achievable and not overwhelming.
To prove that diet is more important than transportation.
To encourage people to stop eating meat entirely.
questions.explanation: By saying 'even two or three days a week', the author makes the suggestion feel small and manageable — not an extreme demand.

questions.question: What does 'Individual responsibility and systemic change are not mutually exclusive' mean?
options: Individuals and systems cannot work at the same time.
Both personal actions and large-scale policy changes are necessary and can work together.
Systemic change is more important than individual actions.
Individual actions are more important than systemic change.
questions.explanation: 'Not mutually exclusive' means both can exist at the same time. We need both personal action and systemic change simultaneously.

helpText: Det här är en argumenterande text – identifiera avsändarens STÅNDPUNKT och argument.
Texten kan ha en tydlig vinkel – fråga dig: vad vill författaren att du ska tänka?
'Bortom raderna'-frågor kräver att du reflekterar och kopplar till egna erfarenheter.
Tips: Läs inledning och avslutning extra noga – där brukar huvudbudskapet finnas.

spelling.title: Argumentation
spelling.description: Stava ord för argumentation och diskussion på engelska.

exercises.question: Vilket ord stavas rätt? ('bevis/belägg')
exercises.explanation: Evidence stavas E-V-I-D-E-N-C-E.
exercises.hint: Tänk noggrant på grammatikregeln för denna fråga.

exercises.sentence: Consider the problem from another ___. (perspektiv)

helpText: Argumentationsord används när du diskuterar, debatterar och argumenterar på engelska.
Centrala ord: argument, evidence, therefore, however, moreover, claim, support, oppose.
Tips: Lär dig orden i sammanhang – tänk på vilken typ av text de hör hemma i.

helpText: Oregelbundna verb måste du kunna i alla tre former: infinitiv – preteritum – perfektparticip.
Vanliga tripplar: speak/spoke/spoken, write/wrote/written, break/broke/broken, know/knew/known.
Tips: Lär dig fem tripplar åt gången. Upprepa dem högt: 'speak – spoke – spoken'.

helpText: Dessa ord stavas ofta fel – var extra uppmärksam på stumma bokstäver och ovanliga kombinationer!

Tips: Identifiera vilken del av ordet du brukar stava fel och fokusera extra på den.

spel.title: Samla mynt – Avancerad grammatik
spel.description: Utmana dig med svårare grammatik och samla mynt!

questions.question: Välj korrekt mening:
options: If I would have more money, I could travel.
If I had more money, I could travel.
If I have more money, I can travel.
If I will have more money, I could travel.
questions.explanation: Villkorssats typ 2: 'If + past simple, would + verb'. 'If I had more money, I could travel.'

questions.question: Vilket är korrekt i reported speech? Han sa: 'I am tired.'
options: He said that he is tired.
He said that he was tired.
He said that he will be tired.
He said that he has been tired.
questions.explanation: I reported speech backshiftar vi tempus: 'am' → 'was'.

questions.question: Välj rätt form: 'She ___ to Paris twice.'
questions.explanation: Present perfect används för erfarenheter: 'has been'.

questions.question: Vilket ord passar bäst? 'Despite ___ tired, she finished the race.'
questions.explanation: Efter 'despite' + gerund: 'Despite being tired...'

questions.question: Välj rätt passiv form: 'The letter ___ yesterday.'
questions.explanation: Passiv i past simple: 'was/were + past participle'.

questions.question: Vilket är korrekt? 'I wish I ___ taller.'
questions.explanation: Efter 'I wish' används were (subjunctive) för alla pronomen.

questions.question: Välj rätt: 'Not only ___ she speak French, but also Spanish.'
questions.explanation: Inversion efter 'not only': 'Not only does she...'.

questions.question: Vad är skillnaden mellan 'used to' och 'would'?
options: 'Used to' kan beskriva tillstånd, 'would' bara handlingar
'Would' kan beskriva tillstånd, 'used to' bara handlingar
questions.explanation: 'Used to' kan säga 'I used to be shy', men 'would' används bara för upprepade handlingar.

questions.question: Välj korrekt relativ bisats: 'The book ___ I borrowed was interesting.'
questions.explanation: 'Which' används för saker. 'Who' används för personer.

questions.question: Välj rätt: 'By the time she arrived, we ___ for two hours.'
questions.explanation: Past perfect continuous: en pågående handling som slutade vid ett tidigare tillfälle i det förflutna.

spel.title: Samla mynt – Avancerat ordförråd
spel.description: Utöka ditt ordförråd med svårare engelska ord!

questions.question: Vad betyder 'ambiguous'?
questions.explanation: 'Ambiguous' betyder tvetydig – något kan tolkas på flera sätt.

questions.question: Vad betyder 'inevitable'?
questions.explanation: 'Inevitable' betyder oundviklig – något som måste hända.

questions.question: Vad betyder 'persevere'?
questions.explanation: 'Persevere' betyder kämpa vidare, hålla ut trots svårigheter.

questions.question: Vad betyder 'eloquent'?
questions.explanation: 'Eloquent' betyder vältalig – att uttrycka sig skickligt.

questions.question: Vad är synonymt med 'enormous'?
questions.explanation: 'Enormous' och 'huge' är synonymer – båda betyder enorm/jättestor.

questions.question: Vad betyder 'collaborate'?
questions.explanation: 'Collaborate' betyder samarbeta.

questions.question: Vad är motsatsen till 'vague'?
questions.explanation: 'Vague' = otydlig. Motsatsen är 'clear' = tydlig.

questions.question: Vad betyder 'fluctuate'?
questions.explanation: 'Fluctuate' betyder variera/pendla upp och ner.

questions.question: Välj rätt synonym till 'hostile':
questions.explanation: 'Hostile' = fientlig. Synonym: 'aggressive'.

questions.question: Vad betyder 'sustain'?
questions.explanation: 'Sustain' betyder uppehålla, bibehålla eller stödja.
